name: openmbd_male
citation: Tierney. OpenMBD: An Open-Source Multibody Dynamics Simulator for Biomechanics Research and Education. F1000Research, 2026.
description: Open-source multibody ellipsoid human body model, adult male.

Abdomen.description: Anterior trunk between pelvis and rib cage. Ellipsoids represent paired rectus abdominis, external obliques, and lower abdominal wall. Contact stiffness from Kroell et al. (1971) [9] scaled to regional soft-tissue area.
